zh.Holway, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特霍爾瓦
zh.Rectoral, Ashwater, Devon, Englnad: 英國英格蘭戴文阿希沃特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cary於大約1325年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir William Cary27歲，母親Margaret de Boson23歲。他於1349年與Jane de Bryen在英國英格蘭薩默塞特霍爾瓦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1369年被列為member of parliament 。他去世於1368年之後在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.Holway, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特霍爾瓦
zh-hans.Rectoral, Ashwater, Devon, Englnad: 英国英格兰戴文阿希沃特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cary于大约1325年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir William Cary27岁，母亲Margaret de Boson23岁。他于1349年与Jane de Bryen在英国英格兰薩默塞特霍爾瓦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1369年被列为member of parliament 。他去世于1368年之后在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Cary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Donegal and Westmeath) and English: variant of   Carey  .

variants.name: Decorah
meanings: Americanized form of de Carrie, itself an altered form of French Decary, a variant of Cary 2, with fused preposition de ‘of’. It is found mainly among the Ho-Chunk (i.e. Winnebago) Native American people in WI.

History: The progenitor of the Decorahs was a French soldier, Joseph Sabrevoir de Carrie, who in 1729 settled for a time among the Winnebagos on Doty Island, WI, and married an Indian woman, known in English as Glory of the Morning. Decorah, a city in IA, is named after one of their descendants, Waukon Decorah (c. 1780–1868), a chief of the Winnebago.

variants.name: Carey
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ciardha, a midland surname meaning ‘descendant of Ciardha’, a personal name derived from ciar ‘dark, black’. See Kerry .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhiachra ‘son of Fiachra’.

English: from Carey Barton in Devon or Castle Cary, Lytes Cary, Cary Fitzpaine, or Babcary, all in Somerset, named for the rivers on which they stand; both river names probably derive from the Celtic root car- ‘love, liking’, perhaps with the meaning ‘pleasant stream’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cary was born about 1325, in Devon, England, his father, Sir William Cary, was 27 and his mother, Margaret de Boson, was 23. He married Jane de Bryen in 1349, in Holway, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1369, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as member of parliament . He died after 1368, in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cary est né environ 1325, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Cary, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Boson, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Jane de Bryen en 1349, à Holway, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1369, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament . Il est décédé après 1368, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cary um 1325 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Cary 27 und seine Mutter Margaret de Boson 23. Er hat 1349 in Holway, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Jane de Bryen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1369, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament  aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1368 in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cary è nato il circa 1325 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir William Cary, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Boson, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Jane de Bryen nel 1349, nel Holway, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1369, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament . Morì dopo il 1368, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Caryが約1325年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir William Caryは27歳，母Margaret de Bosonは23歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトホールワイでJane de Bryenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1369年，45歳の時，職業はmember of parliament と記録されている。彼は1368年以後にイギリスイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cary(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cary(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Boson(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 홀웨이에서 Jane de Bryen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1369년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament 이었다. 그는 1368년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cary nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Cary, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Boson, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de Bryen em 1349, em Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1369, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament . Ele faleceu após 1368, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cary родился около 1325 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Cary было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Boson, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Bryen в 1349 г. в местности холвеи, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1369 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament . Он умер после 1368 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cary nació aproximadamente 1325, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Cary, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret de Boson, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Jane de Bryen en 1349, en Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1369, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament . Murió después de 1368, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
